name: Tsundere world
description:
OK I know this doesn't sound good but it can be good idk

Its just your regular planet however there are three things that are mainly different all women in the world are tsunderes and you either got to deal with their attitude or calm them all down and show their good side

Also candy in this world is called Tsufood (it sounds stupid but what else could I have called it) essentially Tsufood allows someone to help a Tsundere relax slightly and for them to be slightly less mean although don't abuse it or else they will think you are calling them a glutton.

Also you have a device you can by called the Affection identification device or abbreviated the AID (I was one letter short of being canceled) but with this device you can scan a Tsundere ́s real affection towards a person those stats are (affection, care, softness and bratiness those stats organized like) (affection from 0.1 to 10.0 care from 0.1 to 4.0 softness from 0.1 to 4.0 and brattiness from 10.0 to 0.1) to as well as side quests that can help you unlock more stuff so I hope this can help to get more alike with the tsundere ́s have fun and don't get expelled from the country.
creator: UncleBackscratcher172
